/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing -fwrapv -fvisibility=hidden -Wno-format-truncation -Wno-format-overflow -mfpmath=sse -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/argproc.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/clientserver.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/collision.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/crc.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/cmdparser.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/cvar.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/filesystem.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/glob.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/md4.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/frame.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/movemsg.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/netchan.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/pmove.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/szone.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/zone.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/shared/rand.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/shared/shared.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/unzip/ioapi.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/unzip/miniz.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/common/unzip/unzip.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_cmd.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_conless.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_entities.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_game.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_init.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_main.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_save.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_send.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_user.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/server/sv_world.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/backends/unix/main.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/backends/unix/network.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/backends/unix/signalhandler.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/backends/unix/system.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/backends/unix/shared/hunk.c.o CMakeFiles/q2ded.dir/src/backends/generic/misc.c.o -o release/q2ded  -lm -ldl -rdynamic -Wl,--no-undefined
